item.title: 2.5lb Spaghetti + Chili Challenge
item.description: Big plates like this always turn into a debate—would you take it on? A fun, flavorful challenge with spaghetti and chili.

media:content.media:description: Big plates like this always turn into a debate—would you take it on? A fun, flavorful challenge with spaghetti and chili.

item.title: HUGE 32" Pizza Challenge

item.title: Can I Close Out This Spaghetti Monster?

item.title: Can This BBQ Beast Beat the Scoreboard?

item.title: 7lb BBQ Horseshoe Challenge
item.description: Can I take on this 7lb BBQ horseshoe with the clock ticking? A fun food challenge focused on big portions, BBQ flavor, and the challenge experience.
